name: Integration Architecture

architecture_decisions.decision: Use provider adapters for all external services.
architecture_decisions.rationale: External contribution, OCR, translation, FX, storage, and notification choices may change before implementation.

architecture_decisions.decision: Provider failures degrade to pending/manual states rather than blocking core trip access.
architecture_decisions.rationale: External services are not fully under Crewly control.

integrations.name: ExternalContributionProvider
integrations.auth_model: provider-specific OAuth/API key/webhook secret, selected in Stage 5
integrations.fallback: manual provider link and manual reconciliation
constraints: Crewly does not process funds directly
Crewly does not initiate refunds or payouts in MVP

integrations.name: ExchangeRateProvider
integrations.fallback: hide converted display value and preserve original currency

integrations.name: ObjectStorageProvider
integrations.fallback: retry upload and mark asset pending

risks_and_constraints.risk: External contribution provider may not support reliable automated contribution import.
risks_and_constraints.mitigation: Require manual reconciliation path and avoid architecture dependency on real-time provider sync.

unresolved_questions.question: Which external contribution provider will be selected for implementation?

stage_4_handoff_notes: UX should support pending/synced/manual contribution states.
stage_5_handoff_notes: Provider selection is required before implementation of automated contribution import.
